diagrams.title: Three-Schema Architecture Pyramid
diagrams.description: Shows the three levels of ANSI/SPARC architecture with external at top, conceptual in middle, and internal at bottom
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the hierarchy and abstraction levels in three-schema architecture, showing how data flows between user views and physical storage

diagrams.title: Data Independence Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Illustrates how changes at different schema levels impact other levels
elements: Impact indicators showing what is affected
diagrams.purpose: Understand which changes affect which schema levels and the concept of data independence

diagrams.title: Schema Mapping in Three-Level Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the transformation of queries and data between schema levels
diagrams.purpose: Understand how DBMS transforms user queries through different schema levels to retrieve physical data
